buckets.description: Questions that link a material's specific property (e.g., strength, flexibility, waterproof, conductivity) to its suitability for a particular function in an everyday object.
Questions that test core concepts of matter, such as having mass, occupying volume, and density (as observed through floating and sinking).
Questions that focus on the methods of scientific inquiry, including designing fair tests, interpreting experimental data, and classifying materials using logical tools like tables and flowcharts.
